name: The Capital City
description: The grand seat of power in the realm. Ancient walls surround a bustling metropolis of trade and intrigue.

name: The Ruins of Vel'Dara
description: Once a thriving elven city, now only crumbling spires remain. Scholars travel far to study its ancient inscriptions.

name: The Battle of Iron Pass
description: A pivotal clash that decided the fate of three kingdoms. The pass is now haunted by the echoes of that fateful day.

name: Sera Nighthollow
description: A wandering ranger last seen in the southern marshes. She carries a silver-tipped bow and a secret older than the realm.
